goal_text:
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'norwich' and should leave on 'thursday'.
The train should go to 'cambridge' and should 'arrive by 18:00'.
Make sure you get 'train ID' and 'travel time'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for a train. The train should depart from norwich and should leave on thursday
The train should go to cambridge and should arrive by 18:00
Make sure you get train ID and travel time
